title: Barebones 3D crops
description: adds 3d models for the plants in a  barebones style textures
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/wVllpTGqYAI" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
This pack adds a 3d model for the plants in Miencraft. Additionally they're given a simplified texture to fit in with the [barebones resourcepack downloaded separately](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/bb).

The pack currently includes models for the following blocks:

Carrots

Beetroots

Potatoes

Wheat

Melon Stem

Pumpkin Stem

Netherwart

Red Mushroom

Brown Mushroom

Sugarcane

Sweet Berry Bush

Warped Fungus

Crimson Fungus

Based on 3D Crops Revamped

[**_Vanilla version here!_**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/3d-crops)

![ad](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e4f78b04f98231e8384f47cbafa0d7d80f41fafc_0.webp)
